hints.description: This company specializes in information management services, including data storage, records management, and data protection. They offer physical and digital solutions for businesses of all sizes, helping them manage and secure their vital documents and data. Notably, they are a leader in secure records storage and have expanded into areas like data destruction and digital transformation services.
hints.funFact1: Founded in 1951 by Martin J. *******, the company initially focused solely on providing secure storage for sensitive government documents, particularly microfilm related to the Cold War. This early focus on national security shaped its commitment to data protection and confidentiality.
hints.funFact2: The company operates over 95 million square feet of real estate globally, making it one of the largest owners of underground space in the world – a significant asset for secure storage and disaster recovery purposes.
